entry.title: Echoes of Silence
entry.summary:
Author: Rae666

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,725Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 3

Summary: Summary: One shot following on from episode 9x14. Eddie confronts Buck about the pills he’s been taking and Buck finally starts letting it all out. Confessions happen.

entry.title: You are my home
entry.summary:
Author: Enti13666

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,372Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 111

Summary: When Christopher calls his grandparents after seeing his father with a copy of his mother, he was hoping for a few weeks of peace in El Paso. What he didn't expect was for his grandparents to sue his father for custody. When his father clearly doesn't want him and doesn't show up in court, Chris does the only thing he can. He calls his Buck. Buck has never let him down before.

entry.title: Sweet, sweet dreams
entry.summary:
Author: Nightskydeer

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,946Chapters: 2/5Kudos: 18

Summary: Buck has had some revelations about his life while Eddie is in Texas. Mainly? He's in love with his best friend, he wants to be his husband and the father of his child, and... he's the stereotypical queer friend who falls in love with a straight guy. How awkward. When Chris calls one day to tell him that Eddie disappeared while working as an Uber driver, he immediately flies to Texas to stay with him and, hopefully, help figure out what happened to his best friend.   Sam and Dean head to El Paso, Texas, to investigate a case linked to a series of disappearances they believe may be connected to the supernatural world. There, they meet Evan Buckley, a desperate firefighter from LA who just wants to find his partner.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: the tip (of the iceberg)
entry.summary:
Author: beetlesandstars

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,892Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 193

Summary: “So,” Buck says, head spinning. He’s really feeling the alcohol now. They definitely should have eaten something before drinking. “No women.” Eddie fumbles as he sets the bottle down on his bedside table. “No women.” “What about men?” Buck blurts, which is—crazy, because again: neither of them are gay. They’re just two straight guys. Two straight guys in Eddie’s bed, tipsy, and—and Eddie doesn’t want to sleep with women. Which means nothing. Beside him, Eddie goes preternaturally still. “I would know, if I—you know.” “Okay.” Buck’s hands twitch at his sides. “I—yeah. Me too.” Then, very seriously, Eddie turns to look at him. “If I were gay, you would be my first call.” Warmth blooms in Buck’s chest. Eddie’s so nice to him. “Dude,” he says, touched. “You’d be my first call too.”Or: a story set in season 2 featuring tequila, Just The Tip, and, finally, a kiss.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: And If I Drown, What Then?
entry.summary:
Author: Allypop_84

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 38,079Chapters: 11/30Kudos: 565

Summary: Post-lawsuit, Buck fights to reclaim his place at the 118. But the team he came back for doesn’t quite feel like home anymore, and the distance between him and Eddie keeps widening. Buck feels himself slowly disappearing - first from the team, then from himself. He's always been good at saving other people. He's never been good at saving himself. Or A Buck and Eddie post-lawsuit fic. ----------- Please heed the tags! This fic explores alcohol and substance abuse and may be triggering for some readers. If these themes are difficult for you, please put yourself first.

entry.title: While you were sleeping...
entry.summary:
Author: Tubagirl

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,607Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 24

Summary: Back from Texas with a new understanding of his feelings, Eddie is desperate to talk to Buck. But every opportunity is lost as Buck is always asleep. What starts as frustration for Eddie turns to concern as he realises the amount Buck is sleeping isn’t normal. Eddie spirals, panicking about whether Buck has an underlying health issue he hasn’t shared. But maybe there is something else going on?  --------- Eddie sighed. It should have been easy to find time to talk to Buck. He inhabited every moment of Eddie’s life. He was still living with Eddie and Christopher. He made breakfast for all of them every morning. He helped Eddie wrangle an increasingly teenage Chris, with all the attitude that brought. They shared meals and they divided up chores. They lived together. But not together. In a house that had been Eddie’s, became Buck’s, and was now Eddie’s again. Never theirs. At work, they had quickly settled into the same shift pattern, with Eddie rejoining the 118 A-shift. They would car share to work, spend the day working side-by-side, then ride home together when their shift ended. So how had there still not been the chance to talk?

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Last chances and second glances
entry.summary:
Author: thebookofcrows

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 181,805Chapters: 54/60Kudos: 926

Summary: St. Anthony’s was his last chance, and Evan knew that. He had been kicked out of five schools in the past six years, and after his sophomore year ended with a meeting between his parents and his last headmaster that could be summarized with: “we’re not kicking him out, but just know that Evan is not welcome back in September.” His parents wanted to send him to military school.       Evan knew he couldn’t survive military school, that would be his last drop, the one that finally shattered the vase. He couldn’t be the type of person that would be able to put himself back together once they broke him down.     This had to work. . . . Buck is the new kid in an El Paso boarding school, trying his best to stay out of trouble. Eddie is a rockstar (in the world of high school popularity) he's captain to the football team, he's dating the most popular girl in school, and looking at a full ride sports scholarship in the fall. He should feel like he won at life, which is why he doesn't understand why the only time he feels alive is when he catches a glimpse of the new guy on the running team. Or in simpler terms: Buddie high-school AU!

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Hold On (Come Back, I Still Need You)
entry.summary:
Author: kikibridges13

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,416Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 5

Summary: “So, when do you and Eddie take off to Nashville?”“Next Thursday, right after shift. I think we over head Chimney and Hen talking about some send off.”“Ah, I see nobody can keep a secret at the 118 still,” Bobby muttered as Buck waved off the other stragglers from the meeting as he started towards the door.“Oh, were we…not…supposed to know about that?” Buck asks.“Just…pretend to be shocked when ‘Thena and I show up to the station before you two leave.” ___________ Sequel to the Every Moment I'm Awake. Three years after the lightning strike, after Evan Buckley almost lost himself to his mental health and addiction, his life has gotten better - he's married to his best friend, has adopted Christopher, and despite the close call at the government lab, he still has the closest thing to a father in his life. All that changes when he and Eddie experience the road trip from hell returning from the Firefigher Games in Nashville. Trying to come to terms with what happened in New Mexico, Buck finds himself spiraling - but will his found family realize it before he hits rock bottom again?

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: I know I can treat you better than he can
entry.summary:
Author: Supernaturalcrimes26

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,530Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 113

Summary: Eddie couldn't keep staying silent, he had to say something. He wouldn't-couldn't let this keep happening. His best friend (and the love of his life) is in a toxic and possibly abusive relationship and he refuses to let him stay in it. He knows its the right thing to do...so why is Buck laughing at him right now??‐---------‐-----------Or, Evan Buckley never left the seals, instead he joined Steve Mcgarret's elite team and became like a son to him. Unfortunately, he may have forgot to mention who exactly Steve is to his friends, so when they overheard him being his stubborn, overprotective self, misunderstandings arise. -------------- Or, or... 5 times Eddie thought Buck was in a toxic relationship + one time he finally said something and everything was cleared up!

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Love is the Running Towards
entry.summary:
Author: napkin_soup

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,457Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 10

Summary: I’ll do anything. I’ll be Derek. He shook the flashback from his mind. Shook the screams– his own– from his memory. He didn’t want to think about it. He couldn’t do this again, the flashbacks and the nightmares and the whole body panic attacks. He’d had enough of that with every other near death experience he’d been through. It was his turn to be happy, to be unshakeable and unaffected. He’d had enough practice. This time would be different.Buck is running, still, from his time in that house in the desert. Eddie is running after him.

entry.title: gay panic gold/operation: get eddie bucked
entry.summary:
Author: Oubliette14

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,868Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 107

Summary: He can do this. It’s just a date. He’s not obligated to go on a second date. Or have sex. Even if the woman did break Buck’s bachelor auction record by spending ten grand. On a date. With Eddie. He can do this. He can. It’ll be fine. Eddie absolutely cannot do this. He gets to his feet, ready to flee, and runs directly into his date. “Woah, easy there, big guy.” She presses him back down in the direction of his chair and Eddie’s knees buckle. “You all right? You kinda look like you’re gonna be sick. Do I need to find a bucket? I might be able to haul a trash can over here if it’s not bolted down. Oh! Wait! Better idea!” She digs through the purse on her shoulder and pulls out a large silicone snack bag. There’s some melted chocolate and a few nuts stuck to the inside. “Here. This should do.” Eddie has a sage green silicone snack bag in his hands. The material is sturdy, looks like it holds up well to repeated washing and abuse. He’s going to have to unswallow his tongue and ask her where she got it. Buck will want to know. Eddie opens his mouth— “I don’t want to have sex with you,” comes out. --- Or: Eddie goes on a date, makes a friend, and gets it together.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Kendall's at the 118
entry.summary:
Author: MaddieBuckleyFan

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 154,681Chapters: 32/?Kudos: 95

Summary: After they get rid of Gerrad the 118 is happy to welcome a new captain: Captain Kendall along with his wife Maddie who is a paramedic. However some of the 118 soon notice that things are off with Maddie and Doug's relationship. When Eddie realises that Maddie is his husband's sister it makes things even more complicated and just increases their worry for Maddie.

entry.title: The Family he made
entry.summary:
Author: AliciaSteinke15

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 246,151Chapters: 65/65Kudos: 975

Summary: When Buck left the Navy Seals he went to Chicago and became a firefighter. While in Chicago, Buck started at FireHouse 51 where he met Kelly Severide and fell in love with him. Two years after asking out Severide, Andy Darden dies and Kelly gets hurt and goes off the deep end but they get through it. A lot happened Buck and Kelly got married but when Shay dies everything changes. Kelly goes off the deep end again but it's worse this time. Buck tries to help but Kelly keeps pushing him away so one day Buck goes to Cheif Wallace Boden and asked to be transferred to another station in LA. When he tells Kelly to see if he will stop him, he doesn't. Kelly lets the love of his life and husband walk out the door with his wedding ring in Kelly's hand. When Buck gets to LA he joins FireHouse 118 and changes himself.This is the Story of how Evan "Buck" Buckley-Severide became Evan "Buck" Buckley

entry.title: The Boy Next Door
entry.summary:
Author: edmundodiazjr

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,515Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 30

Summary: Buck smiles, almost too warm. “God, you're handsome, you know that?” Eddie chuckled, even though a flicker of discomfort ran through him. “Handsome, loyal, great, sexy…” Buck’s voice trailed, soft but deliberate. Eddie stood up, reaching for his jacket, letting out a huffing laugh at the last word. But when he turned around… Buck was already close. “So sexy…” Buck hushed, his face just inches from Eddie’s. The words were soft, intimate, but the gaze—locked, lingering—made Eddie freeze. OR; the literal (Maybe not) story of the movie The Boy Next Door
